hero.name: Alex Samoliuk
hero.role: From Idea to Working Product — Turnkey
hero.description: Building web products for entrepreneurs: modern stack, fast launch, fully ready for sales.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: A bit about my experience and approach to development
paragraphs: I'm a fullstack developer with experience building products from scratch — from idea to a working MVP that brings first customers.
I specialize in the TypeScript ecosystem: React and Next.js on the frontend, Node.js and NestJS on the backend. A modern stack that lets you launch fast.
Every project is not just code, but a well-thought-out solution to a business problem. You come with an idea — you leave with a deployed product, ready for sales.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies I work with every day

tonMiniApp.title: Telegram Mini App — TON Network
tonMiniApp.description: Gaming app inside Telegram with TON Connect integration: wallet connection, on-chain transactions, smart contract interactions. Built the frontend from scratch — authored 40% of the codebase.

adminDashboard.title: Multi-Tenant Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.description: Fullstack management system: visit analytics, multi-chain crypto payments, sub-account creation with site binding. Frontend and backend built from scratch with multi-chain payment integration.

mentalHealth.title: Mental Health Platform + AI
mentalHealth.description: Refactored legacy codebase and integrated an AI assistant with backend APIs. Stabilized the product after multiple previous teams — accelerated the release cycle.

airdropService.title: Crypto Airdrop Service
airdropService.description: Fullstack service built from scratch: multi-chain architecture, smart contract integration, automated token distribution. From DB schema to UI.

evmBot.title: Telegram Bot + EVM Integration
evmBot.description: Bot built from scratch: on-chain event tracking, wallet management, and automated transactions via chat interface. Multi-network EVM integration.

process.title: How I Work
process.subtitle: From first call to product launch

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We discuss your idea, define the MVP and timeline. Free 30-minute call.

design.title: Architecture
design.description: I design the architecture, choose the stack, and align the structure with you.

development.title: Development
development.description: I write code and show progress. You see updates every week.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: I deploy, set up the domain, and verify everything. You get a ready product.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions

solo.question: Can one developer handle everything well?
solo.answer: Yes. My commercial experience is exactly in the full cycle: from architecture to deployment. I built products from scratch at a startup.

cheap.question: Affordable means low quality?
cheap.answer: Lower prices come from no team overhead, not from cutting corners. I have sold projects as proof of quality.

support.question: What if something breaks after delivery?
support.answer: The product is delivered fully working and deployed. That's part of the deal — I don't abandon projects halfway.

timeline.question: How long does development take?
timeline.answer: MVP takes 2 to 6 weeks depending on complexity. Exact timeline is discussed on the first call.
